message:
fix(core): use char count instead of byte length in query conformance validation

The conformance validator at host_adapter.rs:767 used query_text.len()
(byte length) to check the 500-character limit, while the sanitizer in
collectors.rs uses .chars().take(500) (character count). Multi-byte
UTF-8 queries (CJK, emoji) could pass sanitization but spuriously fail
conformance validation. Now uses .chars().count() consistently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
